content.summary: Basic raymarching shader with a signed distance field sphere sitting on an infinite plane. Features orbiting camera, diffuse lighting, and ambient light. A good starting point for learning SDF-based rendering in TouchDesigner.
warnings: GPU cost scales with max ray steps — reduce the loop count (64) for lower-end hardware
No inputs required — this is a fully generative 3D scene

uniforms.description: Output resolution for aspect ratio correction
uniforms.name: uResolution

uniforms.description: Elapsed time in seconds for camera orbit animation
uniforms.name: uTime
